creator: kusumi.tomohiro@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Yuri Pankov from comment #4)

> - what is the test case here?

Not sure what you mean.
The bug is quite obvious and I tried it myself with/without extra-directories.

There is no such thing unittest code for this.
If you want it, go ahead and write it.

> - why leave the argument if it's unused?

It comes from the same format used in makefs, and some fs use it.
If you don't want it, remove it in a different commit...
